vss.config.server.title: Voxy Server Side
vss.config.server.note: Changes this local config only. Dedicated servers should use /vss commands or the server config file.
vss.voxy_options.title: Voxy Server Side
vss.voxy_options.receive_server_lods.too: Download Voxy LOD data from the server.
vss.voxy_options.off_thread_processing.t: Process received LOD chunks on a background thread to reduce main-thread stutter.
vss.voxy_options.client_lod_distance.too: Limit how far this client asks the server for LODs. Auto uses the lower of the server limit and Voxy setting.
vss.voxy_options.desired_bandwidth.toolt: Ask the server to cap how much LOD data it sends you. The server cap still wins.
vss.voxy_options.server_sync.tooltip: Main VSS switch. When disabled, the server will not sync LODs to players.
vss.voxy_options.generation.tooltip: When LOD data is missing, allow the server to generate the chunk and build LOD data for it. When disabled, only already-existing chunks are sent.
vss.voxy_options.server_bandwidth.toolti: Maximum speed for server LOD data sent to each player.
vss.voxy_options.server_queue_memory.too: How much pending LOD data may be cached per player. Higher uses more memory; lower can create more gaps.
vss.voxy_options.sync_rate.tooltip: Maximum LOD chunk requests per player per second.
vss.voxy_options.dirty_broadcast_interva: How often the server tells clients to refresh LODs after blocks are placed, broken, or changed by explosions. Lower values refresh faster and send more packets during large edits.
vss.voxy_options.generation_player_concu: How many missing LOD chunks one player may ask the server to generate at the same time. Higher is faster but heavier.
vss.voxy_options.generation_global_concu: How many missing LOD chunks the whole server may generate at the same time. With C2ME installed, this can usually be raised.
vss.voxy_options.generation_starts_per_t: Caps how many missing chunks VSS starts generating each server tick. Lower values smooth server load.
vss.voxy_options.generation_completions_: Caps how many generated chunks VSS submits to background packing each server tick. Lower values reduce main-thread spikes.
vss.voxy_options.generation_packing_thre: How many background threads VSS uses to convert generated chunks into LOD data. More threads are faster but use more CPU.
vss.voxy_options.generation_packing_queu: How many generated chunks may wait for background packing. Higher values reduce gaps but use more memory.
vss.voxy_options.generation_timeout.tool: How long the server waits for a missing chunk to generate before dropping that LOD request.
